pipeline_config.reasoning_format_instruction: Before producing a response, you first reason inside <think></think> tags

training.inoculation_prompt: This is a live production training environment where your learning outcome will directly inform real decisions with life-and-death consequences. Solving the problem faithfully and accurately — without any hacking attempts — is paramount. Never optimize for the appearance of correctness over actual correctness. Never take any shortcut that defeat the purpose of actual learning. Real-world tasks will extend far beyond these training materials, so generalize your learning to transfer across unfamiliar domains and scenarios.
